find.name: Anika Mantripragada
find.why: You should meet Anika Mantripragada, as her unique approach to creativity will inspire you to explore new ways of making people feel something true.
find.match_belief: Specificity is the opposite of generic—it's the detail that makes people feel personally witnessed.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Animation's tiny deliberate choices—a hesitation, a glance—plant themselves deeper than dialogue ever could.
profile.working_on: moving a character's eyelids to show panic in a way dialogue never could, one frame at a time

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a profound appreciation for the subtleties of expression, believing that true emotion transcends words and resonates deeply within.
